@Tetra_Field ok changes on the boss in order: bullet speed up, more fruit per hit, bouncing, more fruit per hit, bullet speed up, bullet speed up+doubles, bouncing, more fruit per hit, ANOTHER speed up
i didn't realise there was a half speed change on the double bullet spawn
the revenge fruit are always the same speed range (varies on which side) for the whole fight
but yeah, it's majorly different to k2
k2 has a set speed on all fruit, always single bullets, water 2 (that you can drop under cause k2), and 2 animated bouncing fruits that spawn in 1/4 directions
the bouncing here is basically random 360 with horizontals/verticals removed
